## Checklist

- [ ] New API endpoints are documented (Postman collection updated or OpenAPI annotations added)
- [ ] Code follows project conventions (package structure, naming, DTO separation)
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated for changed logic
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` values are committed
- [ ] CI passes (backend build + frontend build)
- [ ] PR targets `develop`, not `main` directly (unless hotfix)
